title: Activity actor field empty-string bypasses actor binding check
description: server.rs:818-826: the guard is 'if \!activity_actor.is_empty() && activity_actor \!= actor_uri'. If the JSON activity omits the actor field entirely, serde_json returns Value::Null and as_str() returns "", so is_empty() is true and the check is skipped entirely. A crafted Follow, Undo, or Accept with no actor field passes signature verification (key-id derives actor_uri) without binding that actor to the activity body. Concretely: an attacker who controls a valid key can send an Undo{Follow} with no actor field and unfollow arbitrary persona followers by relying on actor_uri from the keyId alone.
close_reason: Fixed: empty/missing actor field now returns BAD_REQUEST instead of silently passing.
